mapper.select:
SELECT ID, START_TIME, END_TIME, TIME_LENGTH, REMARK, CLOSE_REASON_CODE, CLOSE_REASON_NAME, EFFECT_SHIPVOYAGE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_DIS_CLOSE_SAIL
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_DIS_CLOSE_SAIL( ID, START_TIME, END_TIME, TIME_LENGTH, REMARK, CLOSE_REASON_CODE, CLOSE_REASON_NAME, EFFECT_SHIPVOYAGE, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{startTime, jdbcType=DATE}, #{endTime, jdbcType=DATE}, #{timeLength,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{closeReasonCode, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{closeReasonName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{effectShipvoyage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_DIS_CLOSE_SAIL SET START_TIME = #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, END_TIME = #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, TIME_LENGTH = #{timeLength,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CLOSE_REASON_CODE = #{closeReasonCode,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CLOSE_REASON_NAME = #{closeReasonName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EFFECT_SHIPVOYAGE = #{effectShipvoyage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
